title: Milking Players
description: A customizable mod that lets you milk players adding related achievements
body:
![Milking Players](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9f6eb95836851887d0533e875482ae397d5fe79_0.webp) **Milking Players** is a simple April Fool's mod that lets you **milk players**. That's right! Tired of dealing with negative effects when there’s no cow around? Just take your bucket and drink some milk! Sounds easy, right? Well… not quite. It’s not completely free. Milking **consumes 4 hunger points** (![Drumstick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6451b09292db25bb7115e20549abbcc9e29bc947.png)![Drumstick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d5d72a137ee2524d98680d44ddffed532c20f3b.png)) per bucket. **Saturation** is consumed first, and then food level. It also requires player to **unequip the chestplate**, which is a very important armor piece, in order to use this feature. Mod is designed to be a fun joke rather than a cheat to keep the gameplay **fair** and **enjoyable**. Get ready. It's milkin' time! ## Compatibility Mod integrates with **Wildfire's Female Gender Mod** and **Farmer's Delight**, and also supports extensive config customization. - **[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)**
With this mod you can milk players using glass bottles to get **milk bottles**. Since one bucket equals four bottles, each milking only **consumes 1 hunger point** (![Half а drumstick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8de6b02bc45c3c73e2640ac0e2c769cd8dfc9b7.png)) per bottle. - **[Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender)**
With this mod milking **depends on the gender** of the player being milked. You can **choose** which genders are milkable in the **mod config**. ## Configuration **Milking Players** provides both **common** and **client configs**, giving you а full control over how it behaves. Keep in mind, that common config affects only if it is changed from the server side, while the client config is personalized for each user, regardless of the server. ## Frequently Asked Questions **Q. Can I use this mod in my modpack?**
A. Yes. Feel free to use Milking Players in any modpack, and customize it how you like. Just don’t claim the mod as your own. **Q. Are you going to backport this mod to older versions?**
A. Currently, there are no plans to backport to older versions, but the mod may be updated to newer versions. **Q. Why can’t I milk players in Creative mode?**
A. Players in Creative mode have no hunger bar, so they cannot be milked. Likewise, if a Creative player milks you, you won’t lose any hunger. **Q. Why does this mod exist?**
A. Well, this mod is meant purely as a joke and for fun. I haven’t seen mods with a similar idea, so Milking Players aims to be something new with unique mod integrations. **Q. Where did the idea come from?**
A. The idea came from a [youtube video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IjVRiXeQkG0) by Addictive Flames. I found it really funny, and since this mechanic was only available with Origins mod, I decided to turn it into an independent mod. Besides, the mod only takes a milking mechanic from it and improves it, polishing the idea.
